title: Twinseed
shortDescription: Push seed baskets onto garden plots; clone yourself to reach trickier spots.
description: Push seed baskets onto garden plots by walking into them — baskets slide one cell in your direction. When a basket reaches a plot they pair up and both disappear. Solid tiles (rock, wood, metal crate) block movement; rock breaks with a pickaxe, wood burns with a torch. Ice is slippery — you and pushable items slide until they hit something solid. Water is walkable but seed baskets pushed into it drown; pushing a metal crate into water creates a walkable platform. The clone action drops a ghostly twin at your current position; clone again to teleport back to it — useful when a path becomes blocked.
